creator: goo@t72.ru
text:
On Mon, 9 Apr 2007 16:45:54 GMT
David Thiel <lx@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> - Other than being used by amarok, I don't think this has anything to do
> 	with KDE. Is it ok for me to remove that from the categories?

Yes.

And please apply this small patch.

---------------------------------------------------
--- Makefile.old
+++ Makefile
@@ -14,7 +14,7 @@
 MAINTAINER=    ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=       Shows the "moods" of audio tracks in Amarok

-RUN_DEPENDS=    amarok-1.4.4:${PORTSDIR}/audio/amarok
+RUN_DEPENDS=    amarok>=1.4.4:${PORTSDIR}/audio/amarok
 LIB_DEPENDS=   fftw3f:${PORTSDIR}/math/fftw3-float

 USE_GSTREAMER= yes good
----------------------------------------------------

-- 
Best Regards.
Alexander Bechikov
